name: Persons With Disabilities
description: About: This identifying plate permits qualified applicants to park their vehicle or a vehicle in which they are a passenger in designated disability parking spaces. Available For: Passenger cars, trucks that do not exceed 16,000 pounds empty weight, motor homes, motorcycles. Who Qualifies: A person with a physical impairment that limits the person's mobility to the extent that the person with a disability is unable to walk 200 feet without extreme pain, fatigue or other ill effects or without the aid of a mechanical device. A licensed Colorado physician, Advance Practice Nurse, Podiatrist, or Commissioned Medical Officer must certify under penalty of perjury that the disability causes a substantial mobility limitation. Number of Plates Allowed: The department may issue two identifying placards, two identifying plates, or one plate and one placard to an eligible individual. C.R.S. 42-3-204(3)(b)(I) For more information see Form DR2816 Persons with Disabilities Parking Privileges Pamphlet Requirements: Qualifying person must submit Form DR 2219 Persons With Disabilities Parking Privileges Application For personalized persons with disabilities license plates: Personalized License Plate Application More Information: Research Colorado Revised Statute 42-3-204. 1 CCR 204-10 Rule 25 Persons with Disabilities Parking Privileges , Code of Federal Regulations 23 CFR 1235

description: Cost of License Plates manufactured by Colorado Correctional Industries - Effective July 1, 2025 An embossed plate is a plate with raised lettering pressed into the material. name: Carbon Fund
description: About : The Carbon Fund group special license plate was created with Senate Bill 08-186. Carbon Fund license plates may only be issued to persons that have been authorized by the Colorado Carbon Fund via The Climate Trust. A certificate will be issued to each authorized person that is valid for one set (single for motorcycles) of Carbon Fund license plates. Individuals should contact Natural Capitalism Solutions at (720) 684-6580 to inquire about the issuance of an authorization certificate. Available For: Passenger cars, trucks that do not exceed 16,000 pounds empty weight, noncommercial (not available for any vehicle registered Tax Class A- International Registration Plan- IRP) or recreational vehicles, motor homes and motorcycles. Who Qualifies : A person authorized by Natural Capitalism Solutions by offsetting through the carbon fund. Requirements : Qualifying person must contribute a minimum of $25.00 or offset 50% of their vehicle's annual emissions to the Colorado Carbon Fund via Natural Capitalism Solutions. Donations will be transferred into the Colorado Carbon Fund, for each certificate authorizing issuance of the Carbon Fund license plate. Only one Carbon Fund license plate set (single for motorcycle) per certificate is allowed. The County Motor Vehicle Office will retain and destroy the certificate upon issuance of the Carbon Fund license plate. Fees: One-time fee of $50.00 for issuance or replacement of plates, in addition to other taxes and fees. Personalized License Plate Fees : A one-time fee of $60 with an annual $25 fee collected each year thereafter upon renewal. The center logo is not printed on personalized license plates.
